word: G4015 - περιαστράπτω - periastráptō - per-ee-as-trap'-to - Shine round

sections.paragraph:
- Original: περιαστράπτω

- Transliteration: Periastrapto

- Phonetic: per-ee-as-trap'-to

- Definition:

1. to flash around, shine about

- Origin: from G4012 and G797

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G4012 and G797; to flash all around that is envelop in light: - shine round (about).
